sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa leh a vangliatna sungah thahat un,
Ama thuman sungah kiptak ding un,
Gal kidona sungah A mah’n hong makaih ding,
Topa min tawh nang na gualzo ding hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Topa’ minthan nading le Ama Thu gualzawh nading,
Topa thahat na sung kiptak ding

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Topa le avangliatna sungah thahat un,
Galte mai pan in kihei ngei kei un,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Topa le A vangliatna sungah tha-hat un,
Ama thu ciam nate pel ngeilo ding,
